mechanics.excerpt: TECHNOLOGY The advanced weaponry used by the Clans has spawned the belief that all Clan technology vastly superior t0 the Inner Sphere Clan technology is undoubtedly more advanced; how- ever, tne gap not as wide as it initially appeared_ The Clans have focused most of their research on military technologies weapons genetics computing and materials chemistry: They nave made Tew advances in civilian technologies , where Clans lag far behind the Inner Sphere. The Clans' fixation on the Star League has also stagnated ther technological develop ment.
